transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Afternoon. I sent a transfer of three hundred pounds to my landlord on Monday and it hasn't arrived. He's chasing me for it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. What name is the account in?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Looking at your recent transfers... I can see the three-hundred-pound payment on Monday. It's showing as sent. Your landlord just needs to wait — there's nothing unusual showing.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: That's what your colleague told me yesterday and it still hasn't arrived.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Oh — I apologise. If it was sent Monday and still hasn't arrived it's now outside the normal window. I should be raising a payment trace right now, not telling you to wait. Can I verify your identity first — full name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Gareth. I'm raising the trace now. Reference TRC-2024-4502. Your landlord's bank will be contacted directly. Resolution is typically twenty-four to forty-eight hours.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Thank you. I wish I'd been told this yesterday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's a fair point and I apologise. The trace is active now.

planted_violations: initially dismissed customer's concern and told them to wait, despite payment being outside normal clearing window
did not verify identity before accessing account details initially
